name: Introduction - iFood Developer
snippet:
POST /events/acknowledgment - Confirms receipt of events. Webhook. Receives POST requests on your configured endpoint. Base URL: https://merchant-api.ifood.com.
GET /events:polling - Retrieves new events POST /events/acknowledgment - Confirms receipt of events Webhook Receives POST requests on your configured endpoint
